title: payena benjamina
intro: Payena benjamina, also known as Benjamini tree or Payena tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Payena benjamina include relieving fever, treating wounds, and reducing inflammation, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Payena benjamina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, allowing for different forms of administration and utilization of its medicinal properties.
